name: Bangkok Street Kitchen
description: Thai street food classics: pad thai, curries, and aromatic larbs made with fresh herbs.

name: Bayanihan Filipino
description: Sinigang, lechon, and halo-halo — Filipino cooking built on bayanihan communal spirit.

name: Brasserie Parisienne
tagline: Classic French bistro, without the attitude
description: Time-honoured brasserie cooking: steak frites, bouillabaisse, and crème brûlée.

name: Casablanca Nights
tagline: Argan oil, rose petals, slow fire
description: Moroccan tagines, couscous, and pastilla baked in the tradition of Fez.

name: Cedar Tree Lebanese
description: Levantine mezze and grills: hummus, kibbeh, and charcoal-roasted meats.

name: Churrasco Rio
description: Gaucho-tradition churrasco, feijoada, and açaí desserts.

name: Dragon Pearl
description: Cantonese dim sum by day, Szechuan mains by night — all wok-kissed.

name: El Rincón Mexicano
description: Authentic regional Mexican cooking: handmade tortillas, slow-braised meats, and smoky salsas.

name: Island Spice Caribbean
description: Trinidad, Jamaica, and Barbados on one menu: jerk, roti, and rum desserts.

name: Istanbul Grill
tagline: Where the Bosphorus meets the grill
description: Kebabs, mezes, and Ottoman sweets from Turkey's rich culinary tradition.

name: Jollof House
description: Nigerian and Ghanaian favourites: smoky jollof, egusi soup, suya, and kelewele.

name: Kraków Kitchen
description: Hearty Polish cooking: pierogi, bigos, żurek, and paczki — from the banks of the Vistula.

name: La Pampa Grill
description: Open-fire asado, choripán, and dulce de leche desserts from the pampas.

name: Lalibela Ethiopian
description: Traditional Ethiopian stews (wots) and salads served on injera with an array of sides.

name: Lima Kitchen
description: Modern Peruvian cooking: leche de tigre ceviches, aji amarillo curries, and lomo saltado.

name: Pho Saigon
description: Ho Chi Minh City-style pho, bánh mì, and fresh spring rolls — bright herbs, bold broth.

name: Sakura Garden
description: Seasonal Japanese cooking: sushi, ramen, and izakaya small plates.

name: Seoul Food House
description: Korean barbecue, bibimbap, and banchan — bold flavors with communal table spirit.

name: Smoke & Oak BBQ
description: Texas-style offset smoked meats, pitmaster sides, and house-pickled everything.

name: Spice Route India
description: A journey across Indian regions: Rajasthani dals, Goan seafood, South Indian dosas, and Punjabi tandoor.

name: Tapas Sevilla
description: Andalusian tapas, Iberian ham, and a sherry list that doesn't quit.

name: Tbilisi Table
description: The generosity of Georgian supra culture: cheese bread, dumplings, walnut sauces, and amber wine.

name: Terra Cucina
description: Hand-rolled pasta and wood-fired specialties from the Emilia-Romagna tradition.

name: The Aegean Table
description: Mezze and main plates inspired by the Greek islands: seafood, grilled meats, and honey-soaked sweets.

name: The Mezze House
description: A pan-Levantine spread: Syrian muhammara, Iraqi masgouf fish, Yemeni lamb mandi.
